title: BridgeRequestEnvelope
description: Standard envelope for all Atlas Bridge HTTP/WebSocket requests. Mirrors the BridgeRequestEnvelope struct in Shared/AtlasBridgeContract/include/AtlasBridgeTypes.h.

protocolVersion.description: Bridge protocol version string. Must match kProtocolVersion on the server.

requestId.description: Caller-assigned UUID that uniquely identifies this request. Echoed back in the response envelope.

sessionId.description: Session UUID obtained from a prior SessionConnect handshake.

operation.description: Operation to invoke on the target service, e.g. "GetProjectInfo", "RunBuild".

timestampUtc.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp of when the request was created by the caller.

payload.description: Optional service-specific request data. Schema is defined per service/operation.
